With reference to the captioned subject, we would like to inform you that Crisil ESG Ratings & Analytics Limited, a SEBI registered ESG Rating Provider ( CRISIL ), has assigned to Swaraj Engines Limited ( the Company ) a Crisil ESG Ratings of  Crisil ESG 61 , indicating a  Strong  rating category. Please note that the Company has not engaged Crisil ESG Ratings & Analytics Limited for ESG Rating. Crisil ESG Ratings & Analytics Limited has independently prepared the report based on data pertaining to FY 2025-26 of the Company available in public domain and the report is issued voluntarily by them. |SUBJECT: Updates
